UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALFOX INC. A CALIF. CORP. FELL PROPERTIES INC. A CALIF. CORP. POLK MARKET CO. A CALIF. LTD. PART. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GREEN, ELIZABETH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1390 MARKET ST #2713, LEASE FORFEITED, INCLUDES ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES. CCP 415.46.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALFOX INC. A CALIF. CORP. FELL PROPERTIES INC. A CALIF. CORP. POLK MARKET CO. A CALIF. LTD. PART. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GREEN, ELIZABETH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: [PREMISES RESTORED THROUGH CLERK JUDGMENT ON 07-DEC-94] $4,510.36 RENT, $800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $202.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,512.36, LEASE FORFEITED
